description: Red, round toed sneakers with central lace upSynthetic upper with perforations on the toe box, synthetic suede overlays in the forefoot and heel regionHas branding on the tongue, heel collar and midfoot regionPadded tongue and inner with a cushioned footbedTough rubber outsole with groovesWarranty: 3 months against manufacturing defectsWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
